response.overview: At a new school, Joaquin struggles to find his place, chasing connection in all the wrong directions, while David, surrounded by friends, quietly fades into the background of his own life. As fleeting relationships, misunderstandings, and silent expectations shape their days, both are forced to confront what it truly means to belong. Heterophony explores isolation, identity, and the disconnect between being seen and being understood.
response.tagline: In a world full of noise, some voices never quite align.
response.title: HETEROPHONY
